source_desc: A real Stack Overflow Q&A page (the famous 'sorted array' question). The richest microdata sample in the corpus.
notes: Deeply nested, real-world microdata: one QAPage containing one Question and many Answer items, each with nested Comment and Person items. Mixes http://schema.org/ (some Person items) and https://schema.org/ URLs in the same document - a good normalization test. Large page (~1.2MB) of messy production HTML.
